panels.description: Medium shot: Bagheera the panther, sleek and muscular, looms protectively over young Mowgli in the dappled light of the jungle canopy. Bagheera's expression is one of soft concern, eyes focused on the boy.

bubbles.text: Little brother, you must be careful. The Jungle holds dangers you do not yet understand.
The Law of the Jungle? I know nothing of it, Bagheera. What do you mean?

panels.description: Medium close-up: Bagheera leans in closer, shadow casting over one side of his face. His voice is a low, urgent murmur. Behind them, the jungle foliage is dense and foreboding.

bubbles.text: Akela is losing his grip. You must go to the village and bring back the Red Flower. It is the only way.

panels.description: Close-up: Mowgli's face, showing a spark of newfound resolve in his eyes. He stares intently at the distance, chin set firm.

bubbles.text: The Red Flower. I will find it. I will protect Akela.

panels.description: Wide action shot: Mowgli sprinting through the lush green ferns of the jungle, hair flying, sunlight catching his silhouette as he approaches the edge of a golden valley.

bubbles.text: He moved like a shadow, driven by the urgency of the panther's warning.

panels.description: Wide shot: Mowgli peering from behind a large rock at the edge of a village clearing. In the distance, a small child tends to a herd of cows near a flickering campfire. The orange glow of the 'Red Flower' contrasts with the deep blues of the night forest.

bubbles.text: There it is. The Red Flower. I will bring it home.
